revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox intangible heritage/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>
== See also == {{UNESCO templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Masterpieces of the Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[:en:Radif (music)|Radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>
== See also == {{UNESCO templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Masterpieces of the Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[:en:Radif (music)|Radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>
== See also == {{UNESCO templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Masterpieces of the Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[:en:Radif (music)|Radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[:en:Radif (music)|Radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Masterpieces of the Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} This template is used for UNESCO intangible heritage sites.
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox intangible heritage |Name = <!-- or " | ICH = " --> |Image = |imagesize = |alt = |Caption = <!-- or " | imagecaption = " --> |Country = <!-- or " | Countries = " or " | State Party = " --> |ID = |Region = |Year = |Session = |List = |Below = |Note = }} </syntaxhighlight>
== Example == For example, the text to the left produces the infobox to the right ([[:en:Radif (music)|Radif (music)]]): {{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Infobox intangible heritage | Image = | Caption = | ICH = The Radif of Iranian music | State Party = Iran | ID = 00279 | Region = APA | Year = 2009 | Session = 4th | List = Representative | Below = | Note = }}</syntaxhighlight>
*Image: Image related to list item *Caption: Image caption *ICH: Subject title *State Party: Country which applied for the subject to be added the list *ID: ######. *Region: AFR, AST, APA, ENA, or LAC *Year: Year the subject was added to the list *Session: Session that year *List: Representative, Need of Urgent Safeguarding, or Good Safeguarding Practices *Below: For an extra image *Note: An extra note, or image caption
== TemplateData == <templatedata> { "params": { "child": { "aliases": [ "embed" ] }, "infoboxwidth": {}, "Name": { "aliases": [ "ICH" ] }, "Image": {}, "imagesize": {}, "alt": {}, "Caption": { "aliases": [ "imagecaption" ] }, "State Party": {}, "Country": {}, "Countries": {}, "State Parties": {}, "Domains": {}, "Criteria": {}, "Link": {}, "ID": {}, "Region": {}, "Coordinates": {}, "Year": {}, "Extension": {}, "List": {}, "Session": {}, "Below": {}, "Note": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "child", "infoboxwidth", "Name", "Image", "imagesize", "alt", "Caption", "State Party", "State Parties", "Country", "Countries", "Domains", "Criteria", "Link", "ID", "Region", "Coordinates", "Year", "Extension", "List", "Session", "Below", "Note" ], "format": "block" } </templatedata>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
